test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAddAdminUsersInformationsAndDisplaysAlert
test-method.description: verify a user can able to add new adminusers informations successfully

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAddAdminUsersInformationsAndDisplaysAlert
